name: Carter Jefferson
abstract: Carter Jefferson (1946 – 9 December 1993) was an American jazz tenor saxophonist.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Charles Mingus Quintet, Max Roach Quartet, and Art Blakey and The Jazz Messengers

works.t: Anything Goes: I Get a Kick Out of You

concerts.label: Tribute to Charles Mingus: Mingus Music

about_quotes.speaker: Onaje Allan Gumbs
about_quotes.evidence: So he says, “Well Victor Lewis is on drums, and Carter Jefferson is on tenor and Clint Houston.” “Cool, yeah, okay.” I loved those guys, so if nothing else I’ll have some great cats to work with... But it turned out to be one of the most incredible experiences.
about_quotes.doc_title: Onaje Allan Gumbs interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Dan D'Imperio
about_quotes.evidence: Now in that ... band was Carter Jefferson ... And I brought a bunch of tapes ... which then I bought an Ampex reel to reel and we used to just sit and listen to that stuff
